biological_replicate: two independently produced large-scale batches of EVs isolated from each cell type
technical_replicate: assayed in duplicate for each lot.
experimental_design: healthy vs damaged retinal pigment epithelial cells
we also utilized well-established cell-based assays to compare the effects of these EVs on both healthy and damaged retinal pigment epithelial cells.
factor_value: cell type (hTERT-immortalized MSCs, PC3 cancer cells)
we isolated EVs from bulk suspensions of hTERT-immortalized MSCs and PC3 cancer cells.
number_of_biological_replicates: two independently produced large-scale batches of EVs isolated from each cell type
